ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* The date of the stock price data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stock */,
  "previous_close" REAL /* The closing price of the stock on the previous trading day */,
  "today_open" REAL /* The opening price of the stock on the current trading day */,
  "today_high" REAL /* The highest price reached by the stock during the current trading day */,
  "today_low" REAL /* The lowest price reached by the stock during the current trading day */,
  "today_close" REAL /* The closing price of the stock on the current trading day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* The trading volume for the day */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* The adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* The dividend amount paid on the stock */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* The split ratio of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* The name of the stock */,
  "exchange" INTEGER /* The stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "industry" INTEGER /* The industry to which the stock belongs */,
  "sector" INTEGER /* The sector to which the stock belongs */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* The market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* The name of the CEO of the company */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* The founding date of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* The website of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* The name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location of the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* The website of the stock exchange */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* The time zone of the stock exchange */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* The opening time of the stock exchange */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* The closing time of the stock exchange */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the exchange operates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* The name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry" INTEGER /* The parent industry (for hierarchical classification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industries_parent_industry FOREIGN KEY ("parent_industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* The name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector" INTEGER /* The parent sector (for hierarchical classification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sectors_parent_sector FOREIGN KEY ("parent_sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* The full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* The address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The date of birth of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was last updated */,
  "initial_value" REAL /* The initial value of the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* The current value of the portfolio */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* The risk level of the portfolio (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_contents" (
  "portfolio_content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock in a portfolio */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock owned */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was purchased */,
  "current_price" REAL /* The current price of the stock */,
  "current_value" REAL /* The current value of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* The profit or loss of the stock in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_contents_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_contents_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* The threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Whether the alert is active or not */,
  "last_notified" TEXT /* The date and time when the alert was last notified */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* The method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the market event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event and its impact */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* The impact level of the event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the event (e.g., company, news agency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the news */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market event related to the news */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was published */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the news article (e.g., Reuters, Bloomberg) */,
  "author" TEXT /* The author of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* The URL of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES market_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical analysis record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the technical analysis is performed */,
  "moving_average" REAL /* The moving average value for the stock */,
  "rsi" REAL /* The RSI value for the stock */,
  "bollinger_bands" TEXT /* The Bollinger Bands values for the stock */,
  "vwap" REAL /* The Volume Weighted Average Price (VWAP) for the stock */,
  "momentum" REAL /* The momentum indicator for the stock */,
  "macd" TEXT /* The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the price prediction is made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* The predicted price of the stock */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* The confidence level of the prediction */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* The name of the algorithm used for prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* The version of the model used for prediction */,
  "training_data_date" TEXT /* The date when the training data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock traded */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (buy or sell) */,
  "execution_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade was executed */,
  "fee" REAL /* The fee charged for the trade */,
  "broker" TEXT /* The broker through which the trade was executed */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the trade (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
